scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly into the camera, speaking in a friendly and engaging tone with subtle handheld movement to create an intimate atmosphere while keeping shallow depth of field. After she finishes the first spoken line, cut to a close-up of the product now in her right hand, held close to her face so that viewers can clearly see the packaging details, maintaining a tripod shot to ensure stability. Transition back to the medium shot for the continuation of the dialogue, using a natural pacing and maintaining eye contact with the camera. Introduce a POV shot in which the model demonstrates how she applies or holds the serum, ensuring that the product is in clear focus and visibly emphasized. Conclude the scene by returning to the medium shot, with the product still in her right hand near her shoulder while she wraps up her message, gently zooming out to conclude the scene while preserving a warm and genuine expression.
scene_1.dialogue: I regret not doing this sooner in lash care because I used to struggle with weak. sensitive lashes that barely grew despite trying everything. Then I found ETERNAL EYELASH Premium. and honestly. it felt different from the start. my lashes became visibly fuller and more resilient without any irritation—even with my lash extensions. If you want better lashes that actually last. this is a game changer.
